title: Astonish Daily Shower and Shine, Vegan and Cruelty-free Shower Spray, 750ml, White Lilies
features: Crystal Shine: Achieve a crystal clean finish with this powerful shower spray, designed for fast use as no scrubbing is required. Simply spray and watch it dissolve the dirt away like magic
Works Fast: Time can be limited, that’s why Astonish have designed this shower and shine spray to get to work in a few minutes, dissolving soap scum and limescale build-up

Multi-functional: Designed for an array of bathroom uses, this powerful cleaner is perfect to use on plastic and glass screens, enamel trays, tiles and vinyl curtains. Making it the perfect product to include into your cleaning routine
Vegan: Here at Astonish, we care about our impact and the environment, that’s why all of our products are vegan and cruelty-free
Fresh scent: Not only will you be banishing nasty dirt and germs, but this spray is packed with a lovely white lily scent made from natural oils for a beautiful long-lasting aroma
description: Product Description Here at Astonish we are proud of our products. Whatever your cleaning problem we aim to have a helpful cleaning solution. Now we’re not saying that we can work miracles, let’s be realistic cleaning can on occasions be hard work, but we’ve taken the time to ensure we’ve developed products that get the job done right, nothing less. Achieve a bathroom that shines bright like a diamond with Astonish Daily Shower and Shine Spray; perfect at dissolving limescale and preventing build-up of watermarks. We would recommend that you use daily as part of your cleaning routine to achieve a fresher bathroom, whilst preventing build-up. This three pack will help to keep your home fresher for longer. The fresh white lily scent is perfect to recreate a floral haven; perfect if you’re expecting guests. Ingredients Aqua, Caprylyl/capryl glucoside, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Citric Acid, Parfum, Reaction mass of 5-chloro-2-methyl-2H-isothiazol-3-one and 2-methyl-2H-isothiazol-3-one (3:1), Sodium laureth sulfate
